Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Keith Erhman, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: J. Daniel Plants
Michael Pedhirney, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Thinkequity Partners, LLC

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff J. Daniel Plants' Motion To Compel Further Production Of Documents And A Privilege Log is granted in part and moot in part. Defendant is ordered to produce all responsive documents and verify that reasonable and diligent search has been made. The court finds that the relevance and privacy issues were decided by the prior order, although no request was made for a confidentiality order at that time. However, despite the late request for a confidentiality order, the production of the unredacted stock registry shall be made subject to an order that the registry and its information shall be held in confidence, not to be revealed to anyone except counsel and parties, and not to be used except in this litigation. Further production shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order.
The court finds that the late compliance with the prior order was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $1,350, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
